title: Memory Address Space Visualization
description: A diagram illustrating how memory is organized into discrete, addressable locations and how a CPU accesses data using a memory address.
relationships: The CPU loads an address into the MAR
The address is sent via the Address Bus to the Memory Module
The Memory Module decodes the address to select a specific Location
The data from the selected Location is placed on the Data Bus
The data is loaded from the Data Bus into the CPU's MDR
